 {"id":"bd-n11g","title":"Fix one-liner installer + flock dependency","description":"## Problem\nThe installer run via: curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/repo_updater/main/install.sh | bash\ncan fail with: 'Could not parse version from GitHub API response' (cached older installer / GitHub API rate limits). Also ru parallel sync currently uses flock for atomic writes, which is missing on some platforms (notably macOS).\n\n## Goals\n- Installer should not require GitHub API to install latest; use releases/latest/download assets and cache-bust internal downloads.\n- Ensure installer docs/behavior clearly support cache-busting (ru_cb query param).\n- Remove hard runtime dependency on system flock by using a portable lock fallback (mkdir/ln lock), or otherwise ensure reliable cross-platform behavior without requiring system package installs.\n\n## Acceptance Criteria\n- One-liner installer works reliably without GitHub API.\n- Installer uses cache-busting for its own downloads and provides actionable guidance.\n- Parallel sync atomic results aggregation works on macOS and Linux without requiring flock.\n- ShellCheck passes (severity warning+).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-05T13:46:06.325794458-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-05T14:06:33.033656291-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-05T14:06:33.033656291-05:00","close_reason":"Core fix complete: installer avoids GitHub API, flock replaced with portable dir-based locking. Tests need updating for new lock function names."}

 {"id":"bd-nqjy","title":"Implement file denylist enforcement","description":"# File Denylist Enforcement

## Parent Epic: bd-jk4n (Security Guardrails & Validation)

## Purpose
Prevent committing sensitive or ephemeral files regardless of agent output.

## Default Denylist Patterns

```bash
AGENT_SWEEP_DENYLIST_PATTERNS:
.env
.env.*
*.pem
*.key
id_rsa
id_rsa.*
*.p12
*.pfx
credentials.json
secrets.json
node_modules
__pycache__
.pyc
dist/
build/
*.log
.DS_Store
```

## Implementation

```bash
# Check if file matches denylist
# Args: $1=file_path (relative)
# Returns: 0=denied, 1=allowed
is_file_denied() {
    local file="$1"
    for pattern in $AGENT_SWEEP_DENYLIST_PATTERNS; do
        case "$file" in
            $pattern) return 0 ;;  # Denied
        esac
    done
    return 1  # Allowed
}
```

## Integration with Plan Validation
validate_commit_plan() checks each file against denylist before staging.

## Per-Repo Override
Extend denylist via repo config (.ru/agent-sweep.conf).

## Why This Matters
- Agent might ignore prompt constraints
- Secrets could be exposed
- Enforced by ru, not agent honor system","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-06T16:53:01.335799163-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-06T19:08:08.616049361-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-06T19:08:08.616049361-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented file denylist enforcement with is_file_denied(), filter_files_denylist(), and get_denylist_patterns() functions. Added comprehensive test suite (50 tests passing)."}
-{"id":"bd-o47x","title":"Write E2E tests for agent-sweep workflow","description":"# E2E Tests for Agent Sweep

## Parent Epic: bd-a2wt (Testing Strategy)

## Test File
scripts/test_e2e_agent_sweep.sh

## Tests to Implement

### Basic Workflow Tests
```bash
test_agent_sweep_dry_run() {
    setup_test_env
    setup_ntm_mock
    setup_dirty_repo "testrepo"
    
    local output
    output=$("$RU_SCRIPT" agent-sweep --dry-run 2>&1)
    
    assert_contains "$output" "testrepo" "Should list dirty repo"
    assert_contains "$output" "Dry run" "Should indicate dry run mode"
    
    cleanup_test_env
}

test_agent_sweep_single_repo() {
    setup_test_env
    setup_ntm_mock
    setup_dirty_repo "testrepo"
    
    "$RU_SCRIPT" agent-sweep 2>/dev/null
    local exit_code=$?
    
    assert_equals 0 $exit_code "Should succeed with mock ntm"
    
    cleanup_test_env
}
```

### Failure Mode Tests
```bash
test_agent_sweep_timeout() {
    setup_test_env
    export NTM_MOCK_SCENARIO=timeout
    setup_ntm_mock
    setup_dirty_repo "testrepo"
    
    "$RU_SCRIPT" agent-sweep 2>/dev/null
    local exit_code=$?
    
    assert_equals 1 $exit_code "Should return 1 on timeout"
    
    cleanup_test_env
}

test_agent_sweep_agent_error() {
    setup_test_env
    export NTM_MOCK_SCENARIO=agent_error
    setup_ntm_mock
    setup_dirty_repo "testrepo"
    
    "$RU_SCRIPT" agent-sweep 2>/dev/null
    local exit_code=$?
    
    assert_equals 1 $exit_code "Should return 1 on agent error"
    
    cleanup_test_env
}
```

### Preflight Tests
```bash
test_preflight_rebase_in_progress() {
    setup_test_env
    setup_ntm_mock
    setup_dirty_repo "testrepo"
    
    mkdir -p "$HOME/projects/testrepo/.git/rebase-apply"
    
    "$RU_SCRIPT" agent-sweep --json 2>/dev/null | grep -q "rebase_in_progress"
    assert_equals 0 $? "Should detect rebase in progress"
    
    cleanup_test_env
}
```

## Helper Functions
- setup_dirty_repo(): Create repo with uncommitted changes
- setup_test_env(): Create temp HOME, XDG dirs
- setup_ntm_mock(): Install mock ntm in PATH","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-06T16:56:22.937572014-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-06T20:34:59.003864124-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-o47x","depends_on_id":"bd-wu0c","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-06T16:59:11.109077561-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-o47x","depends_on_id":"bd-kczb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-06T16:59:11.13097606-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-o47x","depends_on_id":"bd-2ze9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-06T17:38:02.238723196-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-obd9","title":"Create comprehensive test suite for review feature","description":"Comprehensive tests for the review feature.

Unit Tests (scripts/test_unit_review.sh):
- test_graphql_batching: verify query generation and parsing
- test_priority_scoring: verify score calculation for all components
- test_plan_validation: verify schema validation catches errors
- test_state_persistence: verify atomic writes and locking
- test_question_detection: verify all three wait reasons

Integration Tests (scripts/test_e2e_review.sh):
- test_dry_run_discovery: verify discovery without sessions
- test_plan_mode_no_mutations: verify gh mutations blocked
- test_worktree_isolation: verify main repo unchanged
- test_resume_from_checkpoint: verify resume works
- test_quality_gates: verify tests run before push

Test Fixtures (test/fixtures/):
- claude_stream/*.ndjson: stream-json examples
- gh/*.json: GraphQL and REST responses
- plans/*.json: review plan examples

Golden Artifacts:
- Expected plan output for fixture repos
- Comparison ignores timestamps

Mocking:
- Mock gh command for unit tests
- Mock claude for integration tests

Acceptance: Tests pass, coverage adequate, fixtures enable reliable testing.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-04T15:43:59.011771438-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-04T21:25:08.284104083-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-04T20:35:40.86476054-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-obd9","depends_on_id":"bd-mnu9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-04T15:45:17.570691494-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
